compiled_state.title: RED: Update test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh for auth-file allowlist behavior
compiled_state.author: Main
compiled_state.description:
## Description

Modify tests/hooks/test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh to assert auth-file allowlist behavior instead of categorical deny. The tests must FAIL (RED) against the current guard implementation.

### Tests to add/modify:
1. **test_allows_agent_with_valid_auth_marker**: Create a marker file /tmp/worktree-isolation-authorized-test-<uuid> containing current PID. Dispatch Agent input with isolation:worktree. Assert: no permissionDecision:deny in output (allowed).
2. **test_blocks_agent_without_auth_marker**: Remove all marker files. Dispatch Agent with isolation:worktree. Assert: permissionDecision:deny (blocked). This is the existing test_blocks_agent_with_worktree_isolation, renamed.
3. **test_blocks_agent_with_stale_auth_marker**: Create marker file with a dead PID (e.g., 99999). Assert: permissionDecision:deny (stale marker treated as absent).
4. **test_cleans_stale_markers**: Create marker files with dead PIDs. Run guard. Assert marker files are removed after guard invocation.
5. Keep existing tests: test_allows_agent_without_isolation, test_allows_non_agent_tools, test_handles_null_tool_input

### Test approach
Each test creates the scenario (marker file present/absent/stale), pipes JSON input to the guard script, and asserts on stdout output and exit code. Tests execute the guard — no source file grepping.

### Files to modify
- tests/hooks/test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh (EDIT)

### TDD Requirement
Tests must FAIL against current worktree-isolation-guard.sh (which categorically denies all isolation:worktree). The test_allows_agent_with_valid_auth_marker test will fail because the current guard always denies.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All tests pass after Task 2 implements the allowlist
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'echo.*---.*test_' tests/hooks/test-worktree-isolation-guard.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] New tests FAIL against current (unmodified) guard
  Verify: echo "RED test — verified by sub-agent before implementation"
